title: Tiny Bees
description: 🐝🐝A light resource pack that makes bees smaller🐝🐝
body:
TINY BEES

This is a small texture pack that makes bees smaller than there chunky counter parts. ![Shrinks the bee to about 1/3 its original size! ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f5d2bb6ca0d90398106ac1b9cf4d1ba1ba4a17_0.webp) **Includes** - Regular Bee - Polinated Bee - Angry Bee - Polinated Angry bee

Requirements

*This texture pack requires ETF and EMF or Optifine*
